title: rubus gizellae
intro: Rubus gizellae, also known as the Gizella black raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It is a shrub native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Rubus gizellae is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
